## Context

Client retries could duplicate order writes.

## Decision

Accept at-least-once writes and de-duplicate downstream.

## Alternatives

- Idempotency keys (deferred at the time).

## Consequences

- Downstream de-duplication is complex.

## Reconciliation

Superseded by AD-004 once idempotency keys were adopted; kept for history, dropped from the index.
